system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_tonkho_govan_theoky2_getall3","body":"
CREATE    PROCEDURE [dbo].[TR_TONKHO_GOVAN_THEOKY2_GETALL3](@year int, @month int)
AS
BEGIN
	--DECLARE @year int = 2025, @month int = 1
	--EXEC TR_TONKHO_GOVAN_THEOKY2_GETALL2 @year, @month
	SELECT B.id, B.mact, B.tenct, B.tenkhoahoc, B.trangthai, B.tinhtrang_fsc, B.malo_id, B.chatluong,
		B.dayy, B.rong, B.dai,
		sokhoi = (B.dayy * B.rong * B.dai) / 1000000000,
		sothanh_hientai = B.sothanh,
		A.sothanh_dauky, A.sothanh_nhap, A.sothanh_xuat, A.sothanh_cuoiky
	INTO #XUATNHAPTON
	FROM tr_tonkho_govan_theoky2 A
		INNER JOIN tr_tonkho_govan B ON A.idTonKho = B.id
	WHERE YEAR(A.ngaythang) = @year AND MONTH(A.ngaythang) = @month

	SELECT A.mact, A.tenct, A.tenkhoahoc, 
		B.malo_nguyenlieu, C.fsc_name, D.tieuchuan_phoi,
		CASE A.trangthai
			WHEN 1 THEN N'Phôi'
			WHEN 2 THEN N'Tinh chế'
		END AS tinhtrang_nguyenlieu,
		A.dayy, A.rong, A.dai,
		tonkho_dauky = SUM(A.sothanh_dauky * A.sokhoi),
		tonkho_nhap = SUM(A.sothanh_nhap * A.sokhoi),
		tonkho_xuat = SUM(A.sothanh_xuat * A.sokhoi),
		tonkho_cuoiky = SUM(A.sothanh_cuoiky * A.sokhoi),
		tonkho_hientai = SUM(A.sothanh_hientai * A.sokhoi)
	FROM #XUATNHAPTON A
		INNER JOIN tr_tonkho_govan_malo B ON A.malo_id = B.id
		LEFT JOIN tr_tinhtrang_fsc C ON A.tinhtrang_fsc = C.fsc_id
		LEFT JOIN tr_loai_tieuchuan_phoi D ON A.chatluong = D.id
	WHERE A.sothanh_dauky + A.sothanh_nhap + A.sothanh_xuat > 0
	GROUP BY A.mact, A.tenct, A.tenkhoahoc, B.malo_nguyenlieu, C.fsc_name, D.tieuchuan_phoi, A.trangthai, A.dayy, A.rong, A.dai
	ORDER BY mact, A.dayy, A.rong, A.dai

	DROP TABLE #XUATNHAPTON;
END
","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.tr_loai_tieuchuan_phoi","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc","dbo.tr_tonkho_govan","dbo.tr_tonkho_govan_malo","dbo.tr_tonkho_govan_theoky2"],"writesTables":[],"flags":["has-group-by","has-temp-table"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
